summary: Iteration 17 tested the Business Closures feature. All backend endpoints (GET/POST/DELETE /api/businesses/me/closures) correctly return 401 without auth. Frontend dashboard shows 5 tabs including 'Cierres' (data-testid='tab-closures'). Closures calendar (data-testid='closures-calendar') displays correctly. Full CRUD flow verified via API.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/closures returns 401 without auth (not 500)
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/closures returns 401 without auth
Backend: DELETE /api/businesses/me/closures/2026-01-01 returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/health returns 200 (healthy)
Backend: GET /api/categories returns 200
Backend: GET /api/businesses returns 200
Backend: GET /api/businesses/slug/test-business-5ecc65fc returns 200/404
Backend: GET /api/bookings/availability/{business_id} returns 200
Backend: POST /api/businesses/me/closures with auth creates closure successfully
Backend: GET /api/businesses/me/closures with auth returns closures list
Backend: DELETE /api/businesses/me/closures/{date} with auth removes closure
Frontend: Home page (/) loads correctly
Frontend: Search page (/search) loads correctly with business listings
Frontend: Business profile page (/business/{slug}) loads correctly
Frontend: /business/dashboard redirects to /business/login without auth
Frontend: Business login stores token, business data, and user role correctly
Frontend: Business dashboard has 5 tabs (Agenda, Servicios, Equipo, Cierres, Fotos)
Frontend: tab-closures (data-testid='tab-closures') exists and is clickable
Frontend: closures-calendar (data-testid='closures-calendar') exists in Cierres tab
Frontend: Closures tab shows 'Marcar días cerrados' section with calendar
Frontend: Closures tab shows 'Días cerrados programados' list section

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI tests passed - login, dashboard tabs, closures tab)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Closures Business for testing via /api/auth/business/register
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested the business closures feature. Key data-testids: tab-closures (on business dashboard), closures-calendar (inside Cierres tab). The closures endpoints are at /api/businesses/me/closures (GET/POST/DELETE). Test business: test_closures_biz@bookvia.com / TestPass123!. The availability endpoint (/api/bookings/availability/{business_id}) returns empty slots when a date is closed. App URL: https://bookvia-prod-deploy.preview.emergentagent.com
